apihelp-echocreateevent-summary: Si gacanta ah ugu kici ogeysiis isticmaale
apihelp-echocreateevent-param-email: Haddii sidoo kale email la dirayo
apihelp-echomarkread-summary: Calaamadee ogeysiisyada isticmaalaha hadda inay yihiin la akhriyey.
apihelp-echomarkread-param-list: Liiska aqoonsiyada ogeysiisyada ee la calaamadeynayo inay yihiin la akhriyey.
apihelp-echomarkread-param-unreadlist: Liiska aqoonsiyada ogeysiisyada ee la calaamadeynayo inay yihiin aan la akhriyey.
apihelp-echomarkread-param-all: Haddii la dejiyo, waxay calaamadaynaysaa dhammaan ogeysiisyada isticmaalaha inay yihiin la akhriyey.
apihelp-echomarkread-param-sections: Liiska qaybaha ee la calaamadeynayo inay yihiin la akhriyey.
apihelp-echomarkread-param-wikis: Liiska wikiyada lagu calaamadeynayo ogeysiisyada inay yihiin la akhriyey (caadiyan waa wiki-ga hadda kaliya).
apihelp-echomarkread-example-1: Calaamadee ogeysiiska 8 inuu yahay la akhriyey
apihelp-echomarkread-example-2: Calaamadee dhammaan ogeysiisyada inay yihiin la akhriyey
apihelp-echomarkread-example-3: Calaamadee ogeysiiska 1 inuu yahay aan la akhriyey
apihelp-echomarkseen-summary: Calaamadee ogeysiisyada isticmaalaha hadda inay yihiin la arkay.
apihelp-echomarkseen-example-1: Calaamadee dhammaan noocyada ogeysiisyada inay yihiin la arkay
apihelp-echomarkseen-param-type: Nooca ogeysiisyada ee la calaamadeynayo inay yihiin la arkay: 'digniin', 'fariin' ama 'dhammaan'.
apihelp-echomarkseen-param-timestampForm: Qaabka waqtiga ee loo adeegsanayo soo saarista, 'ISO_8601' ama 'MW'. 'MW' halkan waa laga baxay, sidaas darteed dhammaan macaamiishu waa inay u wareegaan 'ISO_8601'. Qiyaastan waa la tirtiri doonaa, 'ISO_8601'na wuxuu noqon doonaa qaabka kaliya ee soo saarista.
apihelp-echomute-summary: Aamusi ama ka saar aamusi ogeysiisyada ka imanaya isticmaaleyaal ama bogag gaar ah.
apihelp-echomute-param-type: Liiska aamusiinta ee lagu darayo ama laga saarayo
apihelp-echomute-param-mute: Bogagga ama isticmaaleyaasha lagu darayo liiska aamusiinta
apihelp-echomute-param-unmute: Bogagga ama isticmaaleyaasha laga saarayo liiska aamusiinta
apihelp-echopushsubscriptions-summary: Maamul isdiiwaangelinta riix ee isticmaalaha hadda.
apihelp-echopushsubscriptions+create-sum: Diiwaangeli isdiiwaangelinta riix ee isticmaalaha hadda.
apihelp-echopushsubscriptions+create-par: Bixiyaha adeegga riix ee lagu diiwaangelinayo calaamadda.
Mawduuca APNS (Aqoonsiga xirmada abka) ee lagu diri doono ogeysiiska.
apihelp-echopushsubscriptions+create-exa: Diiwaangeli isdiiwaangelinta riix ee isticmaalaha hadda.
apihelp-echopushsubscriptions+delete-sum: Ka saar isdiiwaangelinta riix ee isticmaalaha hadda ama isticmaale kale oo la cayimay.
apihelp-echopushsubscriptions+delete-par: Calaamadda la xiriirta isdiiwaangelinta riix ee la doonayo in la tirtiro.
Aqoonsiga dhexe ee isticmaalaha ee ku xiran isdiiwaangelinta la doonayo in la tirtiro.
apihelp-echopushsubscriptions+delete-exa: Ka saar isdiiwaangelinta riix ee isticmaalaha hadda.
apihelp-query+notifications-summary: Hel ogeysiisyada sugaya ee isticmaalaha hadda.
apihelp-query+notifications-param-sectio: Qaybaha ogeysiisyada ee la doonayo in la weydiiyo (tusaale isku dar ka mid ah 'digniin' iyo 'fariin').
apihelp-query+notifications-param-groupb: Haddii natiijada lagu kooxeeyo qaybaha. Qayb kasta si gooni ah ayaa loo soo helayaa haddii la dejiyo.
apihelp-query+notifications-param-format: Haddii la cayimo, ogeysiisyada waxaa loo soo celin doonaa iyagoo loo qaabeeyay sidan.
apihelp-query+notifications-paramvalue-f: Loo qaabeeyey bogga Special:Notifications (kaliya taas!) Ha ku tiirsanaan HTML-ka maadaama uu mar walba is beddeli karo.
Waa la joojiyay . Isticmaal $1format=model si aad u hesho xogta cayriin.
Waa la joojiyay . Isticmaal $1format=model si aad u hesho xogta cayriin.
apihelp-query+notifications-param-limit: Tirada ugu badan ee ogeysiisyada la soo celinayo.
apihelp-query+notifications-param-wikis: Liiska wikiyada laga soo helayo ogeysiisyada (caadiyan waa wiki-ga hadda kaliya).
apihelp-query+notifications-param-crossw: Run si loo doorto in la helo ogeysiis kooban oo ku saabsan ogeysiisyada ka imanaya wikiyada shisheeye.
apihelp-query+notifications-param-alertc: Marka natiijooyin digniin oo dheeraad ah la heli karo, isticmaal tan si aad u sii wadato.
apihelp-query+notifications-param-unread: Haddii marka hore la muujinayo ogeysiisyada aan la akhriyey (kaliya waxaa la adeegsadaa haddii groupbysection aan la dejin).
apihelp-query+notifications-param-alertu: Haddii marka hore la muujinayo ogeysiisyada fariimaha ee aan la akhriyey (kaliya waxaa la adeegsadaa haddii groupbysection la dejiyo).
apihelp-query+notifications-param-messag: Marka natiijooyin fariimo oo dheeraad ah la heli karo, isticmaal tan si aad u sii wadato.
Haddii marka hore la muujinayo ogeysiisyada digniinta ee aan la akhriyey (kaliya waxaa la adeegsadaa haddii groupbysection la dejiyo).
apihelp-query+notifications-param-titles: Keliya soo celi ogeysiisyada ku saabsan bogaggan. Si aad u hesho ogeysiisyo aan ku xirnayn bog, isticmaal [] sida cinwaan.
apihelp-query+notifications-param-bundle: Haddii la muujinayo ogeysiisyada aan la akhriyey ee la isku xiri karo iyadoo la raacayo xeerarka isku-xirista noocyada ogeysiisyada.
apihelp-query+notifications-param-notifi: Noocyada ogeysiisyada ee lagu soo celinayo ogeysiisyada.
apihelp-query+notifications-example-2: Liiska ogeysiisyada web-ka, oo loo kooxeeyay qaybaha, lana muujinayo tiradooda.
apihelp-query+unreadnotificationpages-su: Hel bogagga ay jiraan ogeysiisyo aan la akhriyey ee isticmaalaha hadda.
apihelp-query+unreadnotificationpages-pa: Ku dar wadajir bogagga wadahadalka iyo bogga mawduuca ee ay la xiriiraan, sidoo kale isku dar ogeysiisyada aan ku xirnayn bog gaar ah oo la xiriiri isticmaalaha hadda boggiisa isticmaalaha.
Tirada ugu badan ee bogagga la soo celinayo.
Liiska wiki-yada laga soo qaadayo bogagga leh ogeysiisyo aan la akhrin (si caadi ah waxa lagu kooban yahay wiki-ga hadda jira oo keliya).
apihelp-query+unreadnotificationpages-ex: Liiska bogagga leh (tirada ee) ogeysiisyada aan la akhrin
apihelp-echoarticlereminder-summary: Codso xusuusin mustaqbalka ah oo ku saabsan maqaalka la cayimay
apihelp-echoarticlereminder-param-title: Cinwaanka maqaalka ee lagu xasuusinayo isticmaalaha
apihelp-echoarticlereminder-param-commen: Faallo isticmaalaha oo ikhtiyaari ah oo lagu darayo xusuusinta
apihelp-echoarticlereminder-example-1: U samee ogeysiis xusuusin maqaal oo berrito ah oo leh faallo
apihelp-echoarticlereminder-example-2: U samee ogeysiis xusuusin maqaal oo berrito ah oo aan faallo lahayn
apiwarn-echo-deprecation-timestampformat: Qaabka soo saarista timestamp-ka MW halkan waa la joojiyay. Mustaqbalka, ISO 8601 ayaa had iyo jeer loo adeegsan doonaa qaabka soo saarista waqtiga. Cusboonaysii macaamiilkaaga oo u dejiso <var>timestampFormat</var> <kbd>ISO_8601</kbd>.
apiwarn-echo-deprecation-flyout: <kbd>notformat=flyout</kbd> waa la joojiyay waxaana dhowaan laga saari doonaa. Isticmaal <kbd>notformat=model</kbd> si aad u hesho xogta cayriin ama <kbd>notformat=special</kbd> si aad u hesho HTML hore loo diyaariyey.
apiwarn-echo-deprecation-html: <kbd>notformat=html</kbd> waa la joojiyay waxaana dhowaan laga saari doonaa. Isticmaal <kbd>notformat=special</kbd> halkii.
apierror-echo-push-token-exists: Calaamadda la bixiyay hore ayay ugu jirtaa keydka xogta.
apierror-echo-push-token-not-found: Calaamadda la bixiyay lagama helin keydka xogta.
apierror-echo-push-too-many-subscription: Isticmaalaha hadda hore ayuu u diiwaangeliyay tirada ugu badan ee la oggol yahay ee isdiiwaangelinta riix ($1).
apierror-echo-push-topic-required: Goobta mawduuca waa lagama maarmaan u ah bixiyahan.
